summary: Iteration 46 - Tested SSRTE enriched form fields (taille_menage, nombre_enfants, liste_enfants, conditions_vie, eau_courante, electricite, distance_ecole_km, observations). All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend SSRTEDashboard UI verified with all enriched sections visible and functional.

issues: Route is /cooperative/ssrte not /cooperative/ssrte-dashboard - Navbar 'Suivi SSRTE' button works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: SSRTEVisitReport model (backend) has all enriched fields: taille_menage, nombre_enfants, liste_enfants, conditions_vie, eau_courante, electricite, distance_ecole_km, observations
VERIFIED: POST /api/ici-data/ssrte/visit accepts all enriched fields with proper validation
VERIFIED: SSRTEDashboard.jsx has 'Informations du menage' section with taille_menage and nombre_enfants inputs
VERIFIED: SSRTEDashboard.jsx has 'Details des enfants' section with add/remove child functionality (prenom, age, sexe, scolarise, travaille_exploitation)
VERIFIED: SSRTEDashboard.jsx has 'Conditions de vie' section with precaires/moyennes/bonnes/tres_bonnes selectors
VERIFIED: SSRTEDashboard.jsx has eau_courante and electricite checkboxes
VERIFIED: SSRTEDashboard.jsx has distance_ecole_km input field
VERIFIED: SSRTEVisitModal.jsx (agent modal) has all enriched fields matching the dashboard
VERIFIED: Mobile SSRTEVisitFormScreen.js has all enriched fields
VERIFIED: Form validation - submit button disabled until member selected, taille_menage required validation in frontend code
VERIFIED: data-testid attributes present: ssrte-dash-taille, ssrte-dash-enfants, ssrte-dash-add-child, ssrte-dash-distance, ssrte-dash-observations

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All enriched form sections visible and functional)

cooperative.notes: Has 0 members - form is accessible but cannot submit without selecting a member

context_for_next_testing_agent: SSRTE enriched form is fully functional. Backend API /api/ici-data/ssrte/visit accepts all enriched fields. Frontend route is /cooperative/ssrte (not /cooperative/ssrte-dashboard). The cooperative account traore_eric@yahoo.fr has 0 members so full form submission cannot be tested end-to-end without adding members first. All UI sections render correctly.
